_spec_to_mcp_mapping._comment: Each top-level field maps to specific MCP tool calls. Follow the execution order below.
execution_order: 4. subsets[] -> create_subset() for each (static: elements, dynamic: expression)

field_descriptions.hierarchy_name: Passed to create_dimension as hierarchy. null = use dimension_name.
field_descriptions.elements: Passed to create_dimension as elements array [{name, type}]
field_descriptions.edges: Passed to create_dimension as edges array [{parent, child, weight}]
field_descriptions.subsets: Each item -> create_subset. If type=static: pass elements. If type=dynamic: pass expression.
